findings.title: shared/register.md (brand-vs-product operating register)
findings.why: Highest-leverage missing reference; gates motion budget, density, accent dosage, and the anti-slop bar; dependency of the transform-verb, model-tells, remediation, mock-content, and pre-flight adds (gap 05).

findings.title: assets/preflight_checklist.md (mechanical pre-flight gate)
findings.why: N2 layout pre-flight; converts scattered anti-default prose into a runnable gate (hero 2-3 line/wide container, gapless grid-flow-dense bento, no meta-labels/eyebrow-on-every-section, button contrast, breakpoint overflow). Interface has no assets/ dir today.

findings.title: references/design-process/intake_dials.md (three-dials brief read)
findings.why: gap 08t/09; maps a free 'make it look good' brief to explicit DESIGN_VARIANCE / MOTION_INTENSITY / VISUAL_DENSITY values + a one-line Design Read, complementing grounding instead of a fixed median.

findings.title: references/anti-defaults/model_tells.md (per-model defect catalog, refuse-and-rewrite)
findings.why: gap 07; the generic slop list misses the per-model tells that dominate real output (Codex ghost-card/over-round/sketchy-SVG/stripes; Gemini image-hover). Cheap, high-signal. Shareable with audit (detection-side).

findings.title: references/data-viz/data_visualization.md (encoding + chart palettes)
findings.why: gap 14d; data-viz is a genuine static-system surface foundations does not own. Interface only checks it at the quality floor (ux_quality_reference.md §7), never how to build the encoding (chart-type by relationship, encoding hierarchy, categorical/sequential/diverging palettes, accessible chart color).

findings.title: references/color/greenfield_seed.md (cold-start brand-seed workflow)
findings.why: N3; foundations covers register/roles/dark-mode but assumes a palette exists. The no-existing-tokens seed path (derive a primary hue, compose bg/surface/ink/accent/muted in OKLCH, physical-scene theme decision) is missing. Could fold into oklch_workflow.md.

findings.title: references/advanced_interaction_craft.md (springs, gesture/drag, clip-path, @starting-style, WAAPI)
findings.why: gap 08e; the single biggest motion depth gap. emil-design-eng is the corpus's deepest interaction-engineering doc and motion cites none of it; current gesture coverage is one shallow section.

findings.title: assets/easing_duration_card.md (one-page motion decision card)
findings.why: Motion has no assets/. A duration-by-interaction + ease-out-expo curves + never-patterns (no layout-prop animation, no transition:all, no scale(0)) + reduced-motion card is the most-reached-for artifact during a build.

findings.title: references/mock_content_and_tells.md (content-realism + per-model tells, detection)
findings.why: N1+07; audit scores anti-slop generically and never checks content realism (placeholder names, fake round numbers, AI-copy cliches, em-dash, Lorem), the most common 'obviously AI' tell. Pairs the per-model tells as detection (not rewrite).

findings.title: assets/findings_report_template.md (fill-in audit report skeleton)
findings.why: Audit output is prose-only; a template (evidence table, P0-P3 findings, 5-dimension /20 scorecard, owner-mapping column) makes every report consistent and is the artifact users copy. Audit has no assets/ dir.

findings.title: references/remediation_playbook.md (detection-side anti-pattern catalog + fix-priority)
findings.why: gap 11; turns audit findings into a sequenced remediation backlog keyed to owning sibling. Stays inside audit's report/score boundary by pointing fixes at siblings (typography/color/layout/state/component/iconography), never implementing.

findings.title: references/consumer_handoff.md (downstream read-contract) [LOW PRIORITY]
findings.why: The only genuine leverage for a mature, fidelity-bound extraction mode: tighten how interface/sk-code READ a v3 DESIGN.md (authoritative sections, stability-class semantics, fixed-vs-free). Everything else is already covered.

findings.title: do-not-add: aesthetic-preset expansion; standalone writing ref; real-UI-loop/variation expansion; design-lab harness
findings.why: 4 presets already serve the critique-against need and are 'never a chooser'; writing covered in design_principles §6; real_ui_loop (119 lines) + variation_diversity (124 lines) are substantial; design-lab server/route/feedback machinery overlaps deep-loop and is process-heavy (nice-to-have).

findings.title: do-not-add: color-strategy commitment axis; OKLCH channel depth; typography expansion; Gestalt/grid top-up
findings.why: Commitment axis already in palette_theming §2; oklch_workflow already covers channels/APCA/gamut/Tailwind; typography_system covers roles/scale/pairing/measure/hierarchy; Gestalt covered by cognitive_laws + layout_responsive (nice-to-have).

findings.title: do-not-add: AnimatePresence depth; reduced-motion/perf; standalone overdrive ref; 12-principles re-distill
findings.why: animate_presence_patterns + performance_reduced_motion already distill those thoroughly; overdrive is nice-to-have with high slop-risk; 12-principles already in motion_strategy + micro_interactions.

findings.title: do-not-add: a11y/perf expansion; repair/implementation guide; Nielsen/persona/cognitive-load expansion
findings.why: accessibility_performance already covers names/keyboard/focus/contrast/CWV(INP)/motion-perf; repair is sk-code's boundary (keep remediation detection-only); critique_hardening already covers Nielsen/persona/cognitive load.

findings.title: do-not-add: forward-authoring/DESIGN.md-from-directives; more gold examples; color/type/motion guidance; taste content
findings.why: Forward-authoring inverts the measured-extraction identity and was routed to an unbuilt design-spec child (net-new, out of scope, contradicts cardinal fidelity); 4 examples already span the format space; build/taste guidance belongs to foundations/motion/interface.

ruledOut.reason: identity inversion, net-new capability out of scope
nice-to-have, high slop-risk, low everyday leverage
